title: Parent Relief/Parent Relief (Disability)
text:
Parent Relief/Parent Relief (Disability) - SupportGoWhere
Parent Relief/Parent Relief (Disability)
Share link
Provides tax relief of up to $14,000 per dependant, to recognise individuals supporting their parents, grandparents, parents-in-law or grandparents-in-law in Singapore.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
Up to $14,000 per dependant
Claim Parent Relief/Parent Relief (Disability) for up to 2 dependants
May be shared with other claimants provided no one else is claiming any other relief (except Grandparent Caregiver Relief) on the same dependant
Collapse all sections
About this support

For taxpayer who stays with dependant

$9,000 parent relief per dependant

$14,000 Parent Relief (Disability) per dependant



For taxpayer who does not stay with dependant

$5,500 parent relief per dependant

$10,000 Parent Relief (Disability) per dependant

Who is this for?

The dependant:

was 55 years of age or above

is living in your household in Singapore

If the dependant lived in a separate household in Singapore, you must have incurred $2,000 or more in supporting them

has disability or mental impairment (for the claim of Parent Relief (Disability))

How to apply?

For e-Filing

Log in with your Singpass or Singpass Foreign user Account (SFA) at myTax Portal

Go to “Individuals” > “File Income Tax Return”

Select “File” to File Income Tax Return

Go to “4. Deductions, Tax Reliefs and Rebates”

Select “Add New” > “Parent”

Click “Update” and enter your claim



For paper filing

Complete the item on "Parent/Parent Relief (Disability)" on Form B1 & B

Complete the particulars of your dependant(s) in Appendix 2

Where can I find help?

View more details

IRAS Helpline: 1800 356 8300

Airtime charges apply for mobile calls to 1800 service lines. Calls are free of charge only if made from regular land lines in Singapore.

Submit an enquiry

Scheme last updated 23 Sep 2025
SUPPORT RECOMMENDER
Answer a few questions to find schemes and services you may be eligible for.
